Juno_UpdateItemData.4C339D154015E22A444990B27C12C88B:
Increased damage from your primary attack, as well as a Bull's-eye that marks an enemy for improved damage and accuracy. 

Once charged, unleash Frenzied Hunt as a secondary attack to mark and damage nearby enemies and boost your speed.
Juno_UpdateItemData.98C5E5664D56FDAFEC6A749AA5383891:
Your primary attack marks an enemy with a Bull's-eye that improves accuracy and damage, especially with melee weapons. 

Once charged, unleash Frenzied Hunt as a secondary attack to mark and damage nearby enemies and boost your speed.
Juno_UpdateItemData.FA30A430475DE94C4895C28105DBA9CE:
Your primary attack marks an enemy with a Bull's-eye that improves accuracy and damage, especially with ranged weapons. 

Once charged, unleash Frenzied Hunt as a secondary attack to mark and damage nearby enemies and boost your speed.
Juno_UpdateItemData.95A4E2434992000D0B35DB8DE35E5481: Your primary attack marks an enemy with a Bull's-eye that improves damage and accuracy.
Juno_UpdateItemData.FFA69BDD4FA00AE4750200A28197DBB9:
Your primary attack marks an enemy with a Bull's-eye that improves damage and accuracy.

Juno_UpdateItemData.0A141571414746279D58AC85C1E58F53:
Your primary attack marks an enemy with a Bull's-eye that improves damage and accuracy. Hits will damage nearby enemies as well.

Once charged, unleash Frenzied Hunt as a secondary attack to mark and damage nearby enemies and boost your speed.
